This is a testharness.js-based test.

  assert_true: The prototype object must have a property "paintTime" expected true got false

  assert_true: The prototype object must have a property "presentationTime" expected true got false

  assert_inherits: property "paintTime" not found in prototype chain
[FAIL] PerformancePaintTiming interface: paintTiming must inherit property "presentationTime" with the proper type
  assert_inherits: property "presentationTime" not found in prototype chain
